response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  SUM(dly.tot_sls_amt) AS dly_sls_agg_total,
  SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS ord_hdr_total,
  SUM(dly.tot_sls_amt) - SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS reconciliation_variance
FROM main.dly_sls_agg dly
FULL OUTER JOIN main.ord_hdr oh
  ON dly.agg_dt_key = oh.date_key
  AND dly.store_id = oh.store_id
WHERE oh.sts_cd <> 'X'",
  "reason": "Compares daily sales aggregate totals to non-cancelled order revenue by date and store"
}
```
